response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience with strong fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, testing), but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role: no demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows in the last decade (only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience listed, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain exposure. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang in web, GIS, and direct-mail domains — a poor fit for a C++/Windows/fixed-income consulting engagement.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Proven low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of req/s)
Polyglot engineer with prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015); far below the 5-10 year mandatory requirement
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary DB exposure is MongoDB/MySQL on Linux-oriented stacks

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server / Oracle on Windows
